violations.description: Refrigerated Storage. — --Refrigerator or cold storage was insufficient or ineffective at maintaining potentially hazardous food at a temperature of 41F or less. -Walk in cooler at 44-46F.

Cooling of potentially hazardous food. — --Cooling of potentially hazardous food was not accomplished using proper methods. -Ribs were wrapped tightly in plastic at 89F after 1.5 hrs.in walk in cooler. Employee unwrapped and moved to freezer.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Clean inside line microwaves.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Clean fan covers in walk in cooler.
Storage of cleaned equipment and utensils. — --Clean equipment/utensil was not stored in a clean, dry manner to protect from contamination. -Clean rack that holds clean dishes.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Floors need cleaned throughout kitchen.

Cooling of potentially hazardous food. — --Cooling of potentially hazardous food was not accomplished using proper methods. -Smoked ribs tightly wrapped in cellophane in walk in cooler at 125F after 1 hr. Recommend unwrapping or put in freezer until they reach a minimum of 70F and then move to walk in cooler below fans.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Clean step stool in kitchen. -Clean top shelving above prep line.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Kitchen and bathroom floors need more thorough cleaning. Tiles in poor condition.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not maintained in good repair. -Flooring has cracks throughout kitchen. Need new grout also.

Handling and storage of poisonous and toxic materials. — --Secondary container of poisonous or toxic material was not clearly identified to indicated contents. -2 bottles with blue liquid not labeled.
Clean dry location, protected (1 pt deducted)
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Proper storage, labeling, use (3 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Properly designed, located, constructed, operated, maintained, cleaned and chemical test kit provided (2 pts deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
